name: Peach Melba Layer Cake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease and flour two 8-inch round cake pans.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
4. Beat softened butter until light and fluffy using medium speed.
5. Blend in egg yolks and vanilla extract.
6. Alternately add dry ingredients and apple juice concentrate, beating well after each addition.
7. Spread batter evenly into prepared pans.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool the cakes for 10 minutes on wire racks, then remove from pans and cool completely.
10. Drain peaches.
11. Combine peaches, raspberries, and pourable fruit; mix lightly.
12. Spread raspberry fruit spread evenly over one cake layer and place the second cake layer on top.
13. Spoon the fruit mixture over the top of the cake, allowing excess to drip down the sides.
